text: Bro did you see they're expanding the Atlanta Beltline all the way to Buckhead? City actually did something right for once. Ethan's gonna flip when I tell him.
No way — that's been a 10-year argument. Karen must be pumped, she's always dragging you on those walks lol.
She already texted me a screenshot. I'm getting voluntold to walk it opening weekend for sure 😂 Clinic's right in the path too, good for referrals.
Smart move on the clinic angle. You hear about the new NFL concussion protocol they're rolling out? Mandatory 10-day hold after grade 2.
Yeah caught it between patients this morning. Long overdue honestly. Half my athletes would've been back in 3 days under the old rules.
Does that change anything for your return-to-sport timelines?
Tightens up the documentation side more than anything. I already run conservative protocols. My guys don't PR on a Tuesday and play Friday.
Facts. Alright man I'll let you get back to it. Tell Karen congrats on the Beltline win 😂
Did you see Jess's post about PT clinics charging for dry needling? Almost tagged Peak Performance lol. Atlanta PTs really out here catching strays 😅
Saw your buddy Jake hit a new deadlift PR — dropped a comment, told him to come see me at the clinic if that back starts barking. Your crew's grinding 💪
Lily did you see Rachel's post about the 5K? Your aunt is out here running races while I'm rehabbing knees all day in Atlanta 😂 Tell her to come see me before she wrecks herself.
Dad, saw you liked Marcus's post about retirement — almost left a 🔥 comment but figured I'd text you instead. You thinking about hanging it up anytime soon or just being supportive lol
Mom did you see Rachel's post about the Atlanta 5K? Made me think of my CrossFit crew at Buckhead — we should all do one together next year 🏃
Rach, saw you liked that post about Atlanta PTs. That's my lane 😄 Karen said you're sharing everything I do lately — tell her to stop volunteering me for speaking gigs lol
Saw your post on the session you did with those high school athletes, Tom. Solid work — reminds me why we're in this. Doing similar stuff here in Atlanta with some ACL kids, it's rewarding as hell.
Just saw Jake's post about that Atlanta 5K — Ethan's been bugging me to sign him up 😂 You thinking of doing it?

Saw Mike's post about that Atlanta PT conference — commented that we should do a collab session on return-to-sport progressions. Figured he'd appreciate input from someone actually in the trenches at Peak Performance 💪
Darren just saw your post about the Atlanta rec league — Ethan's been bugging me to find him a team since school let out. You still got roster spots?
Bro did you see they're expanding the Atlanta Beltline all the way to Buckhead? City actually did something right for once. Ethan's gonna flip when I tell him.
No way — that's been a 10-year argument. Karen must be pumped, she's always dragging you on those walks lol.
